title: Mattress covers and methods of manufacture
abstract: A mattress cover includes a fabric substrate having a top surface, a foot portion, a first side portion, and a second side portion, wherein the foot portion, the first side portion, and the second side portion each have two edges, wherein at least a portion of one edge of the foot portion is stitched or sewn together with one edge of the first side portion, and wherein at least a portion of a second edge of the foot portion is stitched or sewn together with one edge of the second side portion.
claims: 1. A cover comprising: a fabric substrate having a top surface, a foot portion, a head portion, and side portions comprising a first side portion, and a second side portion, wherein: the foot portion, the head portion, the first side portion, and the second side portion each have two edges; the foot portion comprises: a first rectangular shaped cutout on one end to form a first edge of the foot portion and a first edge of the first side portion, first edge of the foot portion being substantially perpendicular to the first edge of the first side portion; and a second rectangular shaped cutout on a second end to form a second edge of the foot portion and a first edge of the second side portion, the second edge of the foot portion being substantially perpendicular to the first edge of the second side portion; at least a portion of the first edge of the foot portion is stitched or sewn together with at least a portion of the first edge of the first side portion; at least a portion of the second edge of the foot portion is stitched or sewn together with at least a portion of the first edge of the second side portion; the head portion has no cutouts; a portion of the head portion is folded backwards towards a bottom surface of the fabric substrate; at least a portion of a first edge of the head portion of the cover is stitched or sewn together with a first outer edge of the first side portion and at least a portion of a second edge of the head portion is stitched or sewn together with a second outer edge of the second side portion to retain the head portion in a folded position; the first outer edge is substantially perpendicular to the first edge of the first side portion; and the second outer edge is substantially perpendicular to the first edge of the second side portion.
